overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a tranquil walled garden courtyard featuring a central stone fountain. White birds fly around the scene while a character stands near the water. Lush vegetation and historic stone architecture surround the area under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled courtyard garden with central fountain

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the courtyard fountain and surrounding garden

notable_agents.action: standing still near the fountain water
white birds flying around the courtyard and landing near the fountain

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with water jets in the center of the courtyard
tall stone walls enclosing the garden with an arched gateway
tall green leafy trees surrounding the courtyard perimeter
white and purple flowering bushes along the garden edges
grey cobblestone paving covering the courtyard ground
distant mountain range visible beyond the garden walls
ornate black metal lamp post on the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: A peaceful walled garden courtyard with a central stone fountain as the focal point. A character stands near the water while white birds fly around the cobblestone area. The scene is surrounded by historic stone walls, lush trees, and flowering plants under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene exploration of a walled garden courtyard centered around a historic stone fountain. It begins with a wide view of the cobblestone area, where a character stands in quiet contemplation near the flowing water. As the camera glides forward, white birds flutter through the air, weaving between the lush trees and vibrant flowering plants that line the perimeter. The scene then expands to reveal the weathered textures of the surrounding stone walls under a soft, partly cloudy sky, finally settling into a tranquil atmosphere of timeless seclusion.
